title: Aswan ⇄ Luxor
summary: A four-night classic between Aswan and Luxor — the Nile's essential temples at an easy, unhurried pace.
routeOverview: Four nights sailing between Aswan and Luxor, taking in Philae, Kom Ombo, Edfu, and the great monuments of Thebes. Sailable in either direction.

timeline.title: Detailed day-by-day coming soon
timeline.description: We're finalising the full daily programme for this voyage. Contact us and we'll share the complete itinerary, tailored to your dates and group.
